song.title: There is Sunshine in My Soul Today
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C V4 C
song.lyrics: [V1] . C F There is sunshine in my soul today, . C G More glorious and bright, . C F Than glows in any earthly sky, . C G For Jesus is my light. [C] . C O there's sunshine, blessed sunshine, . F While the peaceful, happy moments; . C When Jesus shows His smiling face, . G There is sunshine in my soul [V2] There is music in my soul today, A carol to my King; And Jesus, listening, can hear The song I cannot sing. [V3] There is springtime in my soul today, Fir when the Lord is near The dove of peace sings in my heart, The flowers of grace appear. [V4] There is gladness in my soul today, And hope, and praise, and love, For blessings which He gives me now, For joys laid up above.
